chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1321 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 27.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Siddique, advocate a/w applicant Mr. Shamsul Hadi, advocate for complainant Mr. Tahir Hussain, APG ---------- For the reasons to be recorded later on, the applicant Rahat Khan son of Rehmat Khan, involved in FIR No.790/2024 for the offence punishable under Section 489-F PPC registered at PS Quaidabad, Karachi, is granted bail subject to furnishing further solvent surety of Rs.150,000/- which will be in addition to the solvent surety of Rs.50,000/- and PR bond already submitted to the Nazir in terms of the Court’s Order dated 22.05.2025, thereby total enhanced solvent sum will be equivalent to Rs.200,000/- and PR bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial Court. J U D G E Ashraf
